assertionResults.title: Sign trigger dispatches a command and registers a pending operation

steps.action: Fill 64-hex message and click Test Sign
steps.expected: New Sign pending_operation appears within next tick
steps.observed: Sign request_id was created in signDispatchLog and completion appeared, but pending_operations snapshot only showed Ping entries.

steps.expected: Pending includes Sign with fresh request_id

evidence.network: Relay connected at ws://127.0.0.1:8194 during dispatch

assertionResults.issues: Sign command dispatch succeeds but a Sign row was not observable in runtime_status.pending_operations.

assertionResults.title: Happy-path sign completion (multi-device) surfaces in AppState

steps.action: Run two tabs unlocked to same seeded keyset against local relay
steps.expected: Sign completion maps request_id, pending removed, UI shows success
steps.observed: Sign completion recorded in AppState for request_id, but no explicit success UI (toast/badge/completions list) was observed.

steps.expected: Pending->completion transition with visible success feedback
steps.observed: completionHasRid=true; pendingHasRid=false at all samples; uiHasSuccessToast=false.

assertionResults.issues: Completion is in AppState but required explicit sign-success UI feedback was not observed.

assertionResults.title: Request correlation: the right completion maps to the right pending op

steps.action: Dispatch two back-to-back signs with different messages (222… and 333…)
steps.expected: Distinct request_ids and one completion each
Each request_id completed exactly once; no orphaned pending for those ids
steps.observed: completionCounts were 1 and 1; pendingIds did not include either request_id.

assertionResults.title: Completions are drained every tick and not silently discarded

steps.action: Dispatch sign and inspect AppState completion slice
steps.expected: Completion surfaced into AppState and UI reacts within <=3s
steps.observed: Completion surfaced (completionCountForRid=1), but no explicit completion UI signal was observed.

assertionResults.issues: AppState completion slice updated, but completion-driven success UI feedback was not observable.

assertionResults.title: Rapid-fire sign clicks debounce / dedupe to one dispatch per intent

steps.action: Programmatically click Test Sign 5x in ~1ms for identical message 555…

steps.expected: New dispatch accepted after dedupe window

assertionResults.title: Concurrent sign + ECDH do not interfere

steps.action: Dispatch sign and ECDH concurrently via handleRuntimeCommand
steps.expected: Distinct request_ids within <=100ms and both pending
steps.observed: dispatchWindowMs=2; signId=9515f049… and ecdhId=69564bbc…; both pending together in snapshot.

steps.expected: Both complete with unique request_ids and clear from pending

assertionResults.title: No secrets logged to the browser console during OPS flows

steps.action: Clear console/errors and run sign+ECDH+ping flow
steps.observed: Console/error transcripts were empty on both tabs.

steps.action: Run regex scan on captured transcripts

assertionResults.title: No plaintext operation payloads on the wire

steps.action: Hook WebSocket.send in both tabs and capture outbound payloads during sign+ECDH+ping
steps.expected: No plaintext message_hex_32 or raw psbt fields in outbound relay payloads
steps.observed: Captured payload scan found message_hex_hits=0, psbt_field_hits=0, psbt_uri_hits=0.

evidence.network: Outbound ws://127.0.0.1:8194 frames inspected via send-hook capture

frictions.description: The Demo toolbar Raw link only toggles ?chrome=0 and does not bridge into real AppStateProvider routes.
frictions.resolution: Used /demo/welcome-unlock-modal and clicked Unlock to bridge into /dashboard/demo-profile for real-runtime seeding.

frictions.description: Auto ping traffic adds noisy pending/completion entries during OPS testing.
frictions.resolution: Re-seeded both tabs with shared keyset and filtered evidence to target request_ids/messages for assigned assertions.

frictions.description: Sign operations frequently completed before a Sign pending row could be directly observed in runtime_status snapshots.
frictions.resolution: Captured dispatch request_id and completion correlation, then marked assertions requiring visible Sign pending registration as fail where evidence was insufficient.
